page: Microsoft Azure DC8as_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCASv5 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include any bundled local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated graphics processing units present on this hardware profile, and it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced memory-to-core ratio position this instance as a stable resource for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without the overhead of specialized hardware. It is suitable for general-purpose workloads, including web serving, application hosting, and moderate database operations that utilize external storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC8as_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine within the DCASv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with 8 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. This instance does not include bundled local storage or integrated GPUs, though it is Premium Storage capable for external disk attachments. Additionally, no complimentary public IPv4 addresses are provided. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource sharing. This hardware profile is designed for general-purpose workloads, such as application hosting, web serving, and moderate database tasks that rely on external storage volumes.
